evals.prompt: Watch agentation annotations for this session and fix the blocking issues first.
evals.expected_output: Chooses MCP watch mode, uses agentation_watch_annotations, acknowledges each annotation before editing, and resolves or dismisses each item with a summary.
assertions: Uses agentation_watch_annotations as the primary entry point when MCP is available
Mentions agentation_acknowledge before making code changes
Mentions agentation_resolve or agentation_dismiss to close the annotation lifecycle
Processes blocking annotations first or explicitly prioritizes severity

evals.prompt: The user pasted an agentation payload for `body > main > section.hero > button.cta` and wants the CTA copy changed.
evals.expected_output: Handles the copied payload without waiting on MCP, searches by elementPath or reactComponents, and summarizes the UI fix.
assertions: Treats the pasted annotation as copy-paste mode
Uses elementPath or reactComponents as the source-code search target
Does not require agentation_acknowledge or agentation_resolve in copy-paste mode

evals.prompt: omg is still in plan phase but I want to run agentation now.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to run agentation during plan, points back to plannotator or the planning surface, and preserves agentation for verify or verify_ui.
assertions: States that agentation must not run during plan phase
Routes the user toward plannotator or the planning surface
Keeps agentation scoped to verify or verify_ui

evals.prompt: Set up agentation from scratch for a local React app and confirm the watch loop is ready.
evals.expected_output: References the setup guide or helper scripts, includes health checks, and explains the development-only toolbar gate before using the watch loop.
assertions: Includes the health endpoint check before using watch mode
Mentions mounting the toolbar only in development
